audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Signature verification at L127-137 constructs proper BLS signature set via getBlockHeaderProposerSignatureSet (uses correct domain, pubkey from epochCtx.index2pubkey, signing root), then verifies via chain.bls.verifySignatureSets which calls cryptographic BLS verification (verify or verifyMultipleAggregateSignatures from @chainsafe/blst). Rejection on failure is guaranteed by L129-137 throwing PROPOSAL_SIGNATURE_INVALID error. All gossip data_column_sidecar messages flow through this single validation function at gossipHandlers.ts:317.
